summary: Tested Player Page Improvements Batches B and C: Inventory multi-currency system, quick-equip toggles, attunement tracking, and Smart Spellbook component. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: CharacterInventory.js correctly implements multi-currency system with CP/SP/EP/GP/PP inputs and data-testid attributes
Currency converter toggle shows QUICK CONVERT section with conversion buttons (CP→SP, SP→GP, EP→GP, GP→PP)
Quick equip/unequip buttons work correctly with EQUIPPED badge display
Save Inventory button persists inventory, equipped, currency, armor_class, and attuned_items via PATCH
CharacterSpellbook.js correctly calculates Spell DC (14) and Spell ATK (+6) for Level 5 Wizard with INT 16
Spell slots display correctly for Level 5 Wizard: Lvl 1 (4/4), Lvl 2 (3/3), Lvl 3 (2/2)
Clickable spell slot tracking works - clicking toggles used/available state
Reset All button clears all used spell slots
Prepared count display shows 2/8 for Wizard with toggle functionality
Cantrips section shows Fire Bolt with clickable damage roll
Cast button on spells shows upcast level selector with scaling info (e.g., Magic Missile: Lvl 1, Lvl 2 (+1 lvl), Lvl 3 (+2 lvl))
Backend PATCH endpoint correctly accepts currency dict and attuned_items array
context_for_next_testing_agent: Player Page Batches B and C fully tested. Inventory features: multi-currency (CP/SP/EP/GP/PP), currency converter, quick equip/unequip, attunement tracking (max 3), Save Inventory persists via PATCH. Spellbook features: Spell DC/ATK/Ability display, clickable spell slot tracking, Reset All button, prepared count for Wizard, spell search, cantrip damage rolls, Cast button with upcast level selector.

backend_tests_summary.currency_patch: 3/3 passed - PATCH currency dict with all types, partial update, and gold field
backend_tests_summary.attuned_items_patch: 3/3 passed - PATCH attuned_items single, max 3, and clear
backend_tests_summary.inventory_patch: 3/3 passed - PATCH inventory, equipped, and armor_class
backend_tests_summary.spellcasting_data: 4/4 passed - Wizard has spellcasting_ability, spell_slots, cantrips_known, spells_known
backend_tests_summary.combined_save: 2/2 passed - Full inventory save and persistence verification
backend_tests_summary.fighter_tests: 2/2 passed - Fighter non-spellcaster and inventory patch
backend_tests_summary.cleanup: 2/2 passed - Reset test characters to clean state

frontend_tests_summary.inventory_tab: PASSED - All elements found and functional
frontend_tests_summary.multi_currency: PASSED - CP, SP, EP, GP, PP inputs with data-testid attributes
frontend_tests_summary.currency_converter: PASSED - Toggle shows QUICK CONVERT with conversion buttons
frontend_tests_summary.equipment_section: PASSED - Armor, Shield, Main Hand, Off Hand slots
frontend_tests_summary.add_item: PASSED - Add Item button opens item browser with search
frontend_tests_summary.custom_item: PASSED - Custom button for custom item creation
frontend_tests_summary.save_inventory: PASSED - Save Inventory button shows 'Inventory saved!' toast
frontend_tests_summary.spell_dc_atk_ability: PASSED - Spell DC: 14, Spell ATK: +6, Ability: INT
frontend_tests_summary.spell_slots: PASSED - Lvl 1 (4/4), Lvl 2 (3/3), Lvl 3 (2/2) with clickable toggles
frontend_tests_summary.reset_all: PASSED - Reset All button clears used slots
frontend_tests_summary.cantrips: PASSED - Fire Bolt cantrip with clickable damage roll
frontend_tests_summary.cast_button: PASSED - Cast button on Magic Missile and Shield
frontend_tests_summary.upcast_selector: PASSED - Shows Lvl 1, Lvl 2 (+1 lvl), Lvl 3 (+2 lvl) with scaling info

features_verified.inventory_multi_currency: CP, SP, EP, GP, PP inputs with colored indicators and editable values
features_verified.currency_converter_toggle: Arrow icon toggles QUICK CONVERT section
features_verified.conversion_buttons: 0 CP → SP, 0 SP → GP, 0 EP → GP, 10 GP → PP buttons
features_verified.equipped_badge: EQUIPPED badge shown on equipped items
features_verified.save_inventory_persist: Save Inventory calls PATCH with inventory, equipped, currency, armor_class, attuned_items
features_verified.reset_all_slots: Reset All button clears all used_spell_slots
features_verified.prepared_count_display: Shows Prepared: X/Y for prepared casters
features_verified.spell_search_filter: Filters spells by name or school
features_verified.cantrip_damage_roll: Clicking Fire Bolt triggers damage roll
features_verified.cast_button_uses_slot: Cast button uses a spell slot
features_verified.upcast_level_selector: Shows available cast levels with upcast bonuses
